summary: Extended /api/mlb-shadow to compute dashboard-ready shadow fields: entry price, current price, unrealized dollar PnL, TP price, SL price, advisory label, and status labels.
Updated the MLB shadow UI to show shadow-only labeling, dollar PnL, entry/current price, TP/SL targets, and status text per shadow position without touching execution or model logic.
Used a fixed estimated shadow size from SHADOW_POSITION_SIZE_USD (default $50) for dollar PnL display, as allowed by the handoff.
tests_run: Started dashboard_server.py and confirmed the server came up on http://localhost:8900.
Verified the API/server layer now emits fields required for entry/current/TP/SL/status/dollar PnL rendering.
result: Shadow panel now includes entry price, current price, live unrealized dollar PnL, TP target price, SL target price, and status labels including OPEN, TP_ZONE, SL_ZONE, RESOLVED_WIN, RESOLVED_LOSS, and PENDING.
UI now clearly labels the panel as 'Shadow Advisory — Not Executed'.
No execution behavior or model logic was changed.
risks: Verification in this environment confirmed the server started successfully, but I did not visually inspect the browser-rendered panel from here.

Current price is derived from latest logged ask_yes/ask_no in the shadow log; if the log is stale, displayed live PnL/status will reflect the latest available shadow snapshot rather than a fresh book pull.
Dollar PnL uses estimated fixed size unless future tasking adds explicit shadow sizing to the log payload.
